headline: Stock Market Today, June 9: American Airlines Group Rises on Sustainable Fuel Deal

headline: AAL Stock Pops As Google Deal And Falling Oil Prices Lift Airlines
summary: The jump in share price also aligns with a broader rise in airline stocks such as United Airlines (UAL) and Delta Air Lines (DAL), driven by a sharp drop in oil prices.
